\hline
Bananas & \$ & 2.8 & \$ \\
\hline
 & & Total & \$13.54 \\
\hline

\hline
Bananas & \$................... & 2.8 & \$................... \\
\hline

tex:
At the end of 2021 there were 27 000 rhinos living in the wild.
\newline
The number of rhinos is expected to decrease exponentially by 3\% each year.
\newline

\newline
Give your answer correct to the nearest whole number.
\newline

The number of rhinos is expected to decrease exponentially by 3\% each year.
